notes: v2.4.21 - Travelers: a new Publish All action on the Routers page publishes every traveler for a build at once (all builds or a specific one). Purchasing: the Vendor and Quantity on ad-hoc part lines are now editable. Inventory: physical-inventory lot, date, and certification edits now persist. Non-Conformance: editing a CAPA no longer freezes the app, and the Implement step layout is fixed. Engineering: a one-click Client - Donor vendor button when adding parts to a CATIA assembly. Manufacturing: when an eBOM line is released, already-serialized parts at the old not-released revision are advanced automatically so their CNC queue tiles stop showing as dark (TKT-00238). Planner: the Review status now shows a distinct color from Waiting on Client, and every board now draws its statuses from one shared list.
